journal_entry.reason: Recording sale of 300 cases of snack products at $230 per case with 10% sales tax, partial cash payment of $45,900 and remainder on credit, and recognizing cost of sales at $185 per case.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Mondelez sold inventory to a customer. The transaction involves: (1) recognizing revenue of $69,000 (300 cases × $230), (2) collecting 10% sales tax of $6,900, (3) receiving $45,900 cash via bank transfer, (4) recording $30,000 as accounts receivable for the credit portion, (5) recognizing cost of sales of $55,500 (300 cases × $185), and (6) reducing inventory by the same cost amount. Total debits = $45,900 + $30,000 + $55,500 = $131,400. Total credits = $6,900 + $69,000 + $55,500 = $131,400. The entry balances.
